title: centaurea × ecrenensis
intro: Centaurea × ecrenensis, also known as Eren's knapweed or Eren's centaury, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Centaurea, native to the western part of the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Centaurea × ecrenensis include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × ecrenensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
